title: Tailwind with Frameworks Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of Tailwind integration with React/Vue/Next.js, PostCSS, and component-based composition.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily reason Tailwind CSS is a perfect match for modern component-based frameworks (like React or Vue)?
options: It allow styling each component in isolation directly in the template using utility classes.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which and/or what tool is commonly used to process Tailwind CSS as a plugin during the build process?
Does Next.js have first-class built-in support for Tailwind CSS?
options: Yes, it can be enabled during project initialization (create-next-app).
No, you must install it manually.
Only in older versions of Next.js.

questions.question: Which and/or what companion plugin is commonly used with Tailwind to add vendor prefixes (like -webkit-) to the generated CSS?
Can you use Tailwind with Vite (the modern build tool used by React and Vue)?
options: Yes, as Tailwind is a PostCSS plugin that Vite supports natively.
